meaning: n.集合,装配,集会,集结,汇编
examples: He was to address a public assembly on the issue.
The assembly was mandated to draft a constitution.
Last year the millionth truck rolled off the assembly line.
The Cancer 2020 campaign calls on the Welsh Assembly Government to introduce such a cancer plan.
"He created an assembly line with no regard for these women whatsoever, " Mr Cameron had said.
